blocks.text: Engagement Letter: Pricing Study for Johnson PLC
Ms. Melissa Sexton, VP Finance, Johnson PLC

This letter sets out the terms of the pricing study Pinebrook Advisory Group LLC will conduct for {{fact:f:E-2020-001.client}}. Sign and return the enclosed copy, and we will hold the start date of {{fact:f:E-2020-001.start}} for you.

The question you put to us is the right one: whether your prices reflect what your products are worth, and where your discounting gives that value back. Our study will answer it. We will build the price and margin picture from your own invoice records, walk the discounting practice account by account, and set your list and realized prices against the competitors your team follows. What you will receive is not a binder of charts. You will receive a pricing structure your leadership can defend, a discount policy your sales organization can follow, and the analysis behind both. The work will run roughly seven months, and you will hear from us throughout. We report as we learn, not only at the end.

Jenna Wiley, Principal Consultant, will run the study day to day and will be your first call on any question. Lisa Hernandez, Analyst, will build and test the numbers. I review every page before it reaches you, and I sign what we send. You will always know whose name stands behind the work.

We will need access to invoice-level data and time with the people who set and approve prices. Jenna will send the opening data request once we begin, and we will keep the burden on your staff as light as the work allows. Anything you hand us stays inside this engagement.

Our fee is fixed at {{fact:f:E-2020-001.fee}} and covers all professional time. Out-of-pocket expenses, if any, are billed at cost. Work begins on {{fact:f:E-2020-001.start}}, once your signed copy is in hand.
Johnson PLC will have our full attention. If anything in this letter reads differently than you understood it, call me before you sign and we will set it right.
